------------------1---------------

THE CATALOG of international tale types (ATU) based on the                        H 
                                                                                  A                                 HAns-jörG UTHEr 
                                                                                  n 
system of Aarne/Thompson constitutes a fundamentally new  
edition with extensive additions and innovations. The descriptions                s 
                                                                                   - 
                                                                                 j 
                                                                                  ö 
of the tale types have been completely rewritten and made  
more precise. The essential research cited for each type includes                 r            The Types of International Folktales 
extensive documentation of its international distribution as well as              G 
                                                                                    
monographic works or articles on that type. More than two hundred                 U                        A Classification and Bibliography 
                                                                                  T 
                                                                                  H 
and fifty new types have been added. Types with very limited  
distribution have been omitted. A detailed subject index includes the             E 
most important subjects, actions, and other motifs, including actors              r 

and settings. 

HAns-jörG UTHEr (b. 1944) is Professor of German Literature                      T 
                                                                                 h 
at the University of Duisburg-Essen, a senior member of the                      e 
                                                                                   
editorial staff of the Enzyklopädie des Märchens, Göttingen, and the             T 
former editor of the series “Die Märchen der Weltliteratur”. He                 y 
                                                                                p 
is a prominent scholar in the area of traditions and folk literature             e 
                                                                                 s 
with special interest in historical and comparative studies. He has                
                                                                                 o 
edited over fifty books on folktales and legends, among them critical           f 
                                                                                   
editions of the Brothers Grimm (1996, 2004), Wilhelm Hauff (1999),               I 
and Ludwig Bechstein (1998), and published numerous articles in                  n 
                                                                                 t 
German, English and other languages.                                             e 
                                                                                 r 
                                                                                 n 
                                                                                 a 
Cover: Reineke Fuchs. Illustrator: Christian Votteler. (Reineke Fuchs. Für die Jugend  t 
                                                                                 i 
bearbeitet von Max Barack. Stuttgart 1896.) Bildarchiv Uther, Göttingen.         o 
                                                                                 n 
                                                                                 a 
                                                                                 l
